title: Bobby Legacy
body:
This is [Bobby](https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby) ported to 1.12.2.

Bobby works by caching loaded chunks in a folder called **/minecraft/.bobby**. Real chunks sorround the player and cached chunks beyond the simulation distance are not tickable. This mod can be used on **client** and **server**.

![settings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3469f17811d3e3edff58549d7190e995cbf9531.png)

**Requirements**: [MixinBooter](https://modrinth.com/mod/mixinbooter)

**Incompatibilities**: [Nothirium](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/nothirium), [Particle Culling](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/particle-culling), [Entity Culling](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/entity-culling), [REID](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/reid), [Entity Distance](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/entity-distance-1-12-2) and [Dynamic View](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dynamic-view) are not compatible. This mod does some of what these mods do already. Any mods which involves culling should be disabled.

**If you have [**Universal Tweaks**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/universal-tweaks) disable this line:**

> B:"Frustum Culling"=false

---

**How to Set Up:**

> I:renderDistance=

. Edit this line to extend the render distance past default.

> I:simulationDistance=

. Edit this line to extend or reduce the active chunk radius.


**Demonstration:**

![70](https://i.postimg.cc/WNMhm5QR/2025-10-29-18-37-14.png)

![100](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1375/88/3-png.png)
